name: Scorecard
description: Grouped metric tracking grid for OKR, initiative, or performance review tracking. Rows grouped by category, each showing metric label, current value, target, progress bar, status badge, and optional owner.

slots.header: Section title with _heading4, period selector, export Button
slots.groups: Repeating group sections separated by Separator. Category heading (Text _heading5) + metric rows
slots.metric-row: Each row: label, current value, target, Progress bar, delta Badge (ahead/behind), optional Avatar owner
slots.footer: Overall score summary or aggregate progress

command-center.notes: Group headers use cc-bar with cc-label. Metric values use cc-data. Behind-target rows get cc-glow warning. Progress bars use cc-bar.
